summary: M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001 is CLOSED after PR #110 passed CI, merged into origin/main at 1eaf46fb109f8dca93ba50dd269cbcdea0fef042, and local main synchronized. The accepted artifact is the planning-only M5 playable-slice contract; downstream implementation tasks remain gated by their own task files and reviews.

tests_run.result: All checks successful: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed in 1m39s; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed in 1m3s.
PR #110 merged; origin/main advanced to 1eaf46fb109f8dca93ba50dd269cbcdea0fef042 and local main fast-forwarded.
HEAD, origin/main, and main all resolved to 1eaf46fb109f8dca93ba50dd269cbcdea0fef042 before closure branch edits.
M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001 is the next dependency-ready task after main integration.

decisions: Close M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001 only after PR #110 entered main and local main matched origin/main.
Promote M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001 as the next dependency-ready M5 task.

Keep M5 formal passage, manual node battle, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, release/commercial choices, branding, frozen product/platform/core changes, major cultural-risk decisions, irreversible migrations, and paid services/accounts/secrets as Human Gates.
risks: The slice contract remains a planning artifact with starting hypotheses; downstream implementation, performance, AI, and player-research tasks must provide evidence.
Any missing protocol/save/schema/architecture surface discovered downstream requires systems review and any applicable ADR or Human Gate.
requested_action: Merge this closure checkpoint, sync main, then start M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001 with its task-file owner/reviewer/path constraints.
